The new BMW iX3 is the start of a new era. A real road stunner with a new kind of driving experience, built around you.

The new BMW iX3.
#BMWiX3 #BMW #BMWNewEra #NeueKlasse

To learn more: https://b.mw/uALmn

BMW iX3 50 xDrive: WLTP energy consumption combined: 17,9 - 15,1 kWh/100 km; WLTP CO₂ emissions combined: 0 g/km; CO2-class: A; WLTP electric range: 679-805km

BMW Individual Steering Wheel in digital white available for order optionally starting from 01/26.

Screen contents are subject to change due to ongoing software updates.

Finally, BMW electric that looks this sharp AND delivers real-world range. Neue Klasse is here and it’s speaking loud.  #BMWiX3
